programme.title: FIFA WC 1990 OFFICIAL FILM
programme.desc: Following the sad passing of German football legend Franz Beckenbauer, who is one of only three men to have won the World Cup as both a player and manager, beIN offers the opportunity to re visit Italia 90 and how the icon of the game managed the German side to FIFA World Cup victory.
